summary: Completed frontend testing of Personal Finance Tracker. Found critical Supabase connectivity issues blocking all authentication flows. Client-side validation and UI components working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED - DNS resolution failure for hnunzdvyqgivzeegxbvk.supabase.co
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all authentication (login/register) and data operations

critical_bugs.issue: DataCloneError: Failed to execute 'postMessage' on 'Window': Request object could not be cloned
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents any Supabase operations from completing

integration_issues.issue: Registration form submits but fails due to Supabase connectivity issues
Login form gets stuck in 'Please wait...' state due to network errors

passed_tests: Auth page loads correctly with proper styling
Tab switching between login/register works smoothly
Zod validation working perfectly - email, password, password confirmation
Currency dropdown populated with expected options (USD, EUR, ILS, etc.)
Form field validation shows appropriate error messages
UI responsive design works on mobile (390x844) and tablet (768x1024)
Tab navigation and keyboard accessibility working
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Supabase connectivity issues. The app cannot function as DNS resolution fails for the Supabase URL (hnunzdvyqgivzeegxbvk.supabase.co). This blocks all authentication and data operations. Check network configuration, Supabase URL validity, and environment setup.
